postGrade(address,uint256,uint8).details: Verifies that the student has a valid identity before proceeding

params.subjectId: The unique ID of the subject

params.certificationContract: The address of the new Certification contract

params.gradebookContract: The address of the new Gradebook contract

params.studentRegistryContract: The address of the new Identity contract

ADMIN_ROLE().notice: Returns the hash of the ADMIN_ROLE

PROFESSOR_ROLE().notice: Returns the hash of the PROFESSOR_ROLE

enrollStudent(address,string).notice: Gateway function to mint a student identity through the Identity module

postGrade(address,uint256,uint8).notice: Gateway function for professors to post grades through the Gradebook module

setCertificationContract(address).notice: Updates the address of the Certification module

setGradebookContract(address).notice: Updates the address of the Gradebook module

setStudentRegistryContract(address).notice: Updates the address of the Identity module
